dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses n-period maximum/minimum breakout strategy. Mapped to Donchian Channel indicators (dc_upper/dc_lower) with lookback_period_n=50, which creates a dynamically redrawn channel matching the signal specification. Exit condition uses reverse channel crossing (primary exit) with optional time-based exit set to n/2=25 periods via hold_days_max. Volume/volatility confirmation filter mentioned in entry conditions but not explicitly encoded as specific thresholds were not provided in source material.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses n-period maximum/minimum breakout strategy. Mapped to Donchian Channel indicators (dc_upper/dc_lower) with lookback_period_n=50, which creates a dynamically redrawn channel matching the signal specification. Exit condition uses reverse channel crossing (primary exit) with optional time-based exit set to n/2=25 periods via hold_days_max. Volume/volatility confirmation filter mentioned in entry conditions but not explicitly encoded as specific thresholds were not provided in source material.

source_rule_text: Enter long positions when price exceeds the n-period maximum; enter short positions when price falls below the n-period minimum, using a dynamically redrawn channel that adjusts to recent price range.
